narrative:
Hubbard City has 5,407 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 22.4 percentage points.
